123369.description_ja_short: 香川県三豊市にある標高444mの山。七宝連山を構成する一座で、弘法大師伝説を持つ。
123369.description_en_long: Takanosan is a 444-meter peak in Mitoyo City, Kagawa Prefecture, part of the Shippo mountain range often traversed together with nearby Inazumiyama and Shippozan. Its name is said to stem from a legend that Kobo Daishi buried seven treasures there, and the mountain is listed among Shikoku's 88 scenic views.
123369.description_en_short: A 444-meter peak in Mitoyo, Kagawa, part of the Shippo range, linked to a Kobo Daishi treasure legend.
